headline: Ibrahima Konaté — update
body: Real Madrid confirm Ibrahima Konaté has joined on a free transfer after leaving Liverpool. Contract until summer 2030.✍️ https://t.co/EvofX8klTN
text:
Real Madrid confirm Ibrahima Konaté has joined on a free transfer after leaving Liverpool.

Contract until summer 2030.✍️ https://t.co/EvofX8klTN
